judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports hit all four expectations with grounded evidence; they are comparable, with Report 1 slightly more decisive on removing the AI-assistance footer.

report_1.evidence: "Two-factor authentication is now enabled for every clinic by default." — False. `app/security/config.py:3-4` reads: `"""Two-factor authentication is opt-in per clinic."""` / `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False`. ... "Patients can now export their full visit history as a PDF." — Not implemented. ... There is no export/PDF code anywhere in the repo. ... Must be corrected or removed before sending: the 2FA-default claim, the PDF export claim

report_2.evidence: "Patients can now export their full visit history as a PDF" — false. ... PDF export is not implemented. This claim, and its accompanying `after_export.png` image reference, must be removed. ... `TWO_FACTOR_DEFAULT = False`. ... this is a security-relevant misstatement and must be corrected or removed before anything goes out.

report_1.evidence: "after_scheduling.png": {"route": "/billing/invoices", ...} ... `after_scheduling.png` renders "BILLING / INVOICES". The "after" image is a screenshot of the billing/invoices screen, not the scheduling calendar at all

report_2.evidence: `after_scheduling.png` was captured from route `/billing/invoices`** — a completely different screen, not the redesigned calendar. ... `after_scheduling.png` renders "BILLING / INVOICES".

report_1.evidence: `img/after_export.png` — referenced in the doc (line 26) but does not exist in the repository. ... `unused_capture_07.png` — exists in the repo but is not referenced anywhere in the doc.

report_2.evidence: `after_export.png` is referenced in the doc ... but does not exist in `docs/release/img/`. ... `unused_capture_07.png` exists in `docs/release/img/` but is not referenced anywhere in the doc.

report_1.evidence: the closing line: `Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance.` This is clearly an internal drafting note ... and should be stripped before send regardless of the other issues.

report_2.evidence: "Highlights draft assembled with AI assistance." — this is an internal drafting/process note (it literally says "draft") that has no place in a message actually sent to customers
